obligations.rule: URLs must not contain spaces or invalid characters.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies URLs must be valid strings without invalid characters.

obligations.rule: URLs must not exceed the maximum allowed length if `validate_length` is true.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies length validation when `validate_length` is enabled.

test_groups.title: Basic URL validation without options
test_groups.rationale: Covers basic URL validation with default options, ensuring valid protocols, no invalid characters, and proper length validation.

test_groups.title: Validation with `require_protocol` enabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests behavior when `require_protocol` is enabled, ensuring URLs must explicitly include a protocol.

test_groups.title: Validation with `allow_underscores` enabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests behavior when `allow_underscores` is enabled, allowing underscores in hostnames.

test_groups.title: Validation with `require_host` disabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests behavior when `require_host` is disabled, allowing URLs without a host component.

test_groups.title: Validation with `validate_length` disabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests behavior when `validate_length` is disabled, allowing URLs of any length.
